hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq 'git[^;&|]*(commit|push)' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Claude does not commit or push — the human commits after device testing + review (see AGENTS.md)."}}'; true
